title: New Theatrical Unit 01 has Kirby powers
display_title: New Theatrical Unit 01 has Kirby powers
wikitext:
[]: New Theatrical Unit 01 has Kirby powers             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Wed May 23, 2018 8:57 am So if you notice during the penultimate scene of New Theatrical Evangelion Edition Ha (2.22), the Tenth Angel goes to fire it's eye lasers at the 400% synced pseudo-evolved Unit 01, and Unit 01 blocks this. Shortly afterwards, Unit 01 fires eye lasers of her own that we have never seen before, but seem to have the same effect as those of the Tenth Angel. So does this mean that Unit 01 can absorb the powers of her attacker and send 'em right back at ya? If so, AAA WUNDER is far more fearsome and powerful than we could have ever imagined.

[]: Re: New Theatrical Unit 01 has Kirby powers             Quote Post by ACGT-Samael » Wed May 23, 2018 1:53 pm I think it's just safer to say the Eye Beams are just a use of the AT-Field in an offensive manner, much like the Fist-Cube blast prior to that, and Unit-01's awakening simply allowed it to use them.

[]: Re: New Theatrical Unit 01 has Kirby powers             Quote Post by Neepa » Wed May 30, 2018 5:01 pm Given that the beams of the Angels are addressed as particle beams I would imagine it is the A.T.-Field concentrated on a very small point in space. The air there will be compressed to fusion ignition temperature, then released and accelerated by the field forwards while keeping it in a straight line. Ramiel would be the most obvious candidate to see this process. He charges before firing his beam and this charging time could be the time needed to gather and heat gases up enough to release such a powerful and intense beam when compared to his brethren. Him restructuring his body before firing could be him reforming his field to charge. Zeruel as the strongest Angel could just need less time as Ramiel.

[]: Re: New Theatrical Unit 01 has Kirby powers             Quote Post by PiersM » Sun Jun 24, 2018 1:59 pm Initially assumed it was to imply that Unit 01 was becoming 'Angel' like, as a sort of omen to dangerous possibilities that could (and ultimately do) occur.
